summary: Iteration 14 testing complete. All 16 backend tests pass. Mobile.bg import fix verified: BMW M2 listing (URL: https://www.mobile.bg/obiava-11772388504582211-bmw-m2-competition-swiss-hk-carplay) now returns exactly 17 images (not 24 with 7 low-res dupes). All images contain /big1/ path, no images from related listings block, correct gallery order, city='Sofia', country='Bulgaria'.
test_credentials: None required - import endpoint is public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 focused on mobile.bg import fix. Root cause was: (1) /big1/ path not matched by old regex (only /big/ was matched), (2) Related listings section ('Още обяви в mobile.bg') was bleeding through. Fix: (a) Scoped image search to main gallery (#rezon-gallery / .owl-carousel / .newAdImages / section), (b) Canonical dedup key is now FILENAME only (e.g. 11772388504582211_Au.webp), (c) Updated regex to support big\d* (big1, big2...) in _canon and _score, (d) Added focus.bg to host allowlist, (e) Added data-src-gallery as fallback attribute. All tests pass including regression tests for filename-based dedup.

bmw_m2_import: All images from correct listing ID (11772388504582211)
url_without_extension_fallback: _canon fallback strips /big1/ for URLs without extension
focus_bg_host_allowlist: focus.bg URLs accepted as valid image sources

verified_response.title: BMW M2 COMPETITION* SWISS* HK* CARPLAY
